title: oreosedum album var. micranthum
intro: Oreosedum album var. micranthum, also known as the white stonecrop, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, the white stonecrop has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the white stonecrop can be used to make teas, infusions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
